able , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class XSLTransformer extends Transformer This actor reads an XSLT file and apply it to a dom tree. The file or URL is specif

ply it to a dom tree. The file or URL is specified using any form acceptable to the FileParameter class. Currently, this actor requires the Saxon XSLT processor so as to ensure reproducible results. This restriction may be relaxed in later

lts. This restriction may be relaxed in later versions of this actor. FIXME: what should the type of the input/output ports be???. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: XSLTransformer.java,v 1.17 2004/04/13 03:10:41 cxh Exp $ Author: Yang Zhao, Chr
